description_long: This is a rustic, two-story wooden bar named 'Bar Bourre', featuring a weathered plank facade and a prominent sign above the entrance. The front includes a covered porch with wooden railings, a set of steps, and a balcony on the upper level with a single door and a window. The roof is steeply pitched and covered with reddish-brown tiles, giving the building a classic, old-western appearance. The sides and rear of the building are plain, constructed from vertical wooden planks with no windows or decorative elements. The ground floor facade has large windows and a double-door entrance, while the upper floor is more private with minimal openings. The overall structure is robust and designed to evoke a traditional, welcoming bar atmosphere.
description: A two-story rustic wooden bar with a tiled roof, front porch, balcony, and prominent signage. The facade features large windows and a double-door entrance, while the sides and rear are plain wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Bar Bourre' sign, covered porch, balcony, double-door entrance, and a window and door on the upper level.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain wooden plank wall, the edge of the balcony, and the tiled roof; no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely plain wooden plank wall with no windows, doors, or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden wall, balcony edge, and tiled roof.
attribute_signage: Large, rectangular wooden sign with 'Bar Bourre' text in bold, mounted above the entrance and supported by wooden brackets; no visible lighting or logos.
attribute_entrance_type: Double wooden doors with glass panels, located beneath a covered porch with steps leading up; no awning or decorative elements beyond the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: One large window on the upper front facade next to the balcony door, and several large windows on the ground floor flanking the entrance; all windows are rectangular with wooden framing.
